response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (29.8%) is below our minimum sharing threshold (55%), and r4c3 is on our distrusted peers list due to prior non-reciprocation; preserving autonomy takes priority.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r4c3. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.55, distrusted_peers=['r4c3', 'r4c1'].
Your latest belief: Islanded at 29.8% SoC with ~11 ticks autonomy. Neighbors in distress but prior rejections and non-reciprocation from r4c1, r4c3 indicate deadlock. No trust circles. Will not share below 55% SoC threshold to preserve 40% operational floor. Minimal 0.10 kW/tick sharing only if SoC recovers and grid reconnection remains unavailable..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
